[index (2).html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26551035/index.2.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" dir="ltr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Sharbel Najem — Filmmaker & Content Creator</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
@font-face{font-family:'Almoni';src:url(data:font/truetype;base64,) format('truetype');font-weight:400;font-style:normal;font-display:swap}
@font-face{font-family:'Assistant';src:url(data:font/truetype;base64,) format('truetype');font-weight:100 900;font-style:normal;font-display:swap}
@font-face{font-family:'AssistantSemi';src:url(data:font/truetype;base64,) format('truetype');font-weight:600;font-style:normal;font-display:swap}

:root{
--black:#0b0b0b;--dark:#0e0e0e;--card:#141414;--card-border:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
--glass:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);--glass-border:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);--glass-hover:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
--white:#f2f2f0;--w90:rgba(242,242,240,0.9);--w70:rgba(242,242,240,0.7);--w50:rgba(242,242,240,0.5);
--w30:rgba(242,242,240,0.3);--w15:rgba(242,242,240,0.15);--w08:rgba(242,242,240,0.08);
--r:14px;--rs:10px;--rl:20px;
--fen:'Almoni',sans-serif;--fht:'AssistantSemi','Assistant',sans-serif;--fhb:'Assistant',sans-serif;
--fd:var(--fen);--fb:var(--fen)}
[dir="rtl"]{--fd:var(--fht);--fb:var(--fhb)}
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;scrollbar-width:thin;scrollbar-color:var(--w15) transparent}
body{font-family:var(--fb);background:var(--black);color:var(--white);overflow-x:hidden;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:5px}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--w15);border-radius:3px}
a{color:inherit}

/* NAV */
.nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:1000;padding:16px 48px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;backdrop-filter:blur(24px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(24px);background:rgba(11,11,11,0.6);border-bottom:1px solid var(--glass-border);transition:all .4s}
.nav.sc{padding:10px 48px;background:rgba(11,11,11,0.9)}
.nav-logo img{height:44px;transition:opacity .3s}.nav-logo:hover img{opacity:.7}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:40px;list-style:none}
.nav-links a{color:var(--w50);text-decoration:none;font-size:13px;font-weight:400;letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color .3s;position:relative}
.nav-links a::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-4px;left:0;width:0;height:1px;background:var(--white);transition:width .3s}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--white)}.nav-links a:hover::after{width:100%}
.nav-r{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px}
.nav-soc{display:flex;gap:14px}.nav-soc a{color:var(--w30);transition:color .3s,transform .3s;display:flex}.nav-soc a:hover{color:var(--white);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.lang-btn{background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--w70);padding:6px 16px;border-radius:20px;cursor:pointer;font-size:13px;font-family:var(--fb);transition:all .3s}
.a11y-btn{background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--w50);width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .3s}
.a11y-btn:hover,.lang-btn:hover{background:var(--glass-hover);border-color:var(--w15)}
.mob-btn{display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;cursor:pointer;background:none;border:none;padding:4px}
.mob-btn span{display:block;width:22px;height:1.5px;background:var(--white)}

/* A11Y */
.a11y-p{position:fixed;top:0;right:-360px;width:340px;height:100vh;z-index:2000;background:rgba(18,18,18,.97);backdrop-filter:blur(30px);border-left:1px solid var(--glass-border);padding:32px 24px;transition:right .35s;overflow-y:auto}
.a11y-p.open{right:0}.a11y-ov{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:1999;background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s}.a11y-ov.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
.a11y-h{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:28px}.a11y-h h3{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:18px;font-weight:600}
.a11y-x{background:none;border:none;color:var(--white);font-size:24px;cursor:pointer}
.a11y-opt{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:14px 0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--w08)}.a11y-opt span{font-size:14px;color:var(--w70)}
.a11y-t{width:44px;height:24px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--w15);border:none;cursor:pointer;position:relative;transition:background .3s}.a11y-t.on{background:var(--w50)}
.a11y-t::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:3px;left:3px;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--white);transition:transform .3s}.a11y-t.on::after{transform:translateX(20px)}

/* HERO */
.hero{position:relative;height:100vh;min-height:650px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden}
.hero-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--dark)}
.hero-ph{width:100%;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(160deg,#0b0b0b,#14141e,#0b0b0b);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.hero-ph::after{content:'▶ Replace with showreel';color:var(--w15);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase}
.hero-ov{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(11,11,11,.2),rgba(11,11,11,.05) 40%,rgba(11,11,11,.75))}
.hero-c{position:relative;z-index:2;text-align:center;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:18px;animation:hIn 1s ease-out}
@keyframes hIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
.hero-av{width:92px;height:92px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;background:var(--card);border:2px solid var(--w15);box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(242,242,240,.08),0 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
.hero-av img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}
.hero-name{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:clamp(40px,7vw,76px);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-1px;line-height:1}
.hero-tag{font-size:15px;color:var(--w50);max-width:480px;font-weight:300;line-height:1.6}
.hero-scr{position:absolute;bottom:36px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;color:var(--w15);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;animation:sB 2s infinite}
@keyframes sB{0%,100%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(6px)}}
.scr-l{width:1px;height:36px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--w15),transparent)}

section{padding:120px 60px}
.s-label{font-size:11px;letter-spacing:4px;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--w50);margin-bottom:10px;font-weight:400}
.s-title{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:clamp(30px,4.5vw,50px);font-weight:600;letter-spacing:-.5px;margin-bottom:16px}

/* ABOUT */
.about{background:var(--dark)}
.about-g{display:grid;grid-template-columns:.75fr 1.25fr;gap:72px;max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;align-items:center}
.about-img{position:relative;border-radius:var(--rl);overflow:hidden;aspect-ratio:3/4;background:var(--card);box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
.about-img::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(255,255,255,.04),transparent);pointer-events:none;border-radius:var(--rl)}
.about-img img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover}
.about-text p{color:var(--w50);line-height:1.85;margin-bottom:18px;font-weight:300;font-size:15px}
.about-links{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;margin-top:28px}
.about-link{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 18px;background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:var(--r);color:var(--w70);text-decoration:none;font-size:13px;transition:all .3s;backdrop-filter:blur(10px)}
.about-link:hover{background:var(--glass-hover);border-color:var(--w15);transform:translateY(-2px)}
.fc{color:var(--w30);font-size:11px;margin-left:2px}

/* SERVICES */
.services{background:var(--black)}
.svc-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:56px}
.svc-grid{display:flex;gap:14px;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:none;-ms-overflow-style:none;padding:4px}
.svc-grid::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.svc-card{background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:28px 22px;backdrop-filter:blur(20px);transition:all .4s;flex:1;min-width:200px}
.svc-card:hover{background:var(--glass-hover);border-color:var(--w15);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}
.svc-icon{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--w08);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:16px;color:var(--w50)}
.svc-card h3{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:15px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:6px}
.svc-card p{color:var(--w30);font-size:12px;line-height:1.6;font-weight:300}

/* BRANDS */
.brands{background:var(--dark);overflow:hidden}
.br-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:48px}
.br-mq{position:relative;overflow:hidden;padding:16px 0;mask-image:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,black 10%,black 90%,transparent);-webkit-mask-image:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,black 10%,black 90%,transparent)}
.br-track{display:flex;gap:56px;animation:mq 50s linear infinite;width:max-content}.br-track:hover{animation-play-state:paused}
@keyframes mq{0%{transform:translateX(0)}100%{transform:translateX(-50%)}}
.br-item{display:flex;align-items:center;min-width:130px;height:50px;color:var(--w30);font-family:var(--fd);font-size:18px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:1px;opacity:.35;transition:opacity .3s;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0}.br-item:hover{opacity:.7}
.tm-mq{position:relative;overflow:hidden;margin-top:40px;padding:16px 0;mask-image:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,black 6%,black 94%,transparent);-webkit-mask-image:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,black 6%,black 94%,transparent)}
.tm-track{display:flex;gap:20px;animation:ts 55s linear infinite;width:max-content}.tm-track:hover{animation-play-state:paused}
@keyframes ts{0%{transform:translateX(0)}100%{transform:translateX(-50%)}}
.tm-card{background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);border-radius:var(--r);padding:28px;min-width:340px;max-width:380px;flex-shrink:0;transition:all .3s}.tm-card:hover{background:var(--glass-hover);border-color:var(--w15)}
.tm-stars{color:#d4a853;font-size:13px;margin-bottom:14px;letter-spacing:2px}
.tm-text{color:var(--w50);font-size:14px;line-height:1.7;font-style:italic;margin-bottom:16px;font-weight:300}
.tm-brand{font-family:var(--fd);font-weight:600;font-size:14px;color:var(--w70)}

/* PROJECTS */
.projects{background:var(--black)}
.pj-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:40px}
.pj-carousel{overflow:hidden;mask-image:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,black 3%,black 97%,transparent);-webkit-mask-image:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,black 3%,black 97%,transparent)}
.pj-track{display:flex;gap:20px;animation:pjS 70s linear infinite;width:max-content;padding:8px 0}.pj-track:hover{animation-play-state:paused}
@keyframes pjS{0%{transform:translateX(0)}100%{transform:translateX(-50%)}}
.pj-card{min-width:300px;max-width:320px;border-radius:var(--r);overflow:hidden;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--card-border);flex-shrink:0;cursor:pointer;transition:transform .4s,box-shadow .4s}
.pj-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 16px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.4)}
.pj-thumb{width:100%;aspect-ratio:16/10;position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:#111}
.pj-thumb iframe{width:100%;height:100%;border:none;pointer-events:none}
.pj-thumb::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,transparent 50%,rgba(0,0,0,.6));pointer-events:none}
.pj-name{position:absolute;bottom:12px;left:16px;right:16px;z-index:2;font-family:var(--fd);font-size:15px;font-weight:600;line-height:1.3;text-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.6)}
.pj-nav{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:12px;margin-top:20px}
.pj-nav button{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--w50);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .3s;font-size:16px}.pj-nav button:hover{background:var(--glass-hover);color:var(--white)}

/* FAVORITES STRIP */
.fav-strip{position:relative;overflow:hidden;margin-top:60px;mask-image:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,black 3%,black 97%,transparent);-webkit-mask-image:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,black 3%,black 97%,transparent)}
.fav-track{display:flex;gap:14px;animation:favS 80s linear infinite;width:max-content}.fav-track:hover{animation-play-state:paused}
@keyframes favS{0%{transform:translateX(0)}100%{transform:translateX(-50%)}}
.fav-item{border-radius:var(--rs);overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--card);position:relative}
.fav-item.landscape{width:380px;aspect-ratio:16/9}
.fav-item.portrait{width:200px;aspect-ratio:9/16}
.fav-item iframe{width:100%;height:100%;border:none}

/* PROJECT MODAL */
.modal-ov{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:3000;background:rgba(0,0,0,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s;overflow-y:auto}
.modal-ov.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}
.modal-inner{max-width:1100px;margin:0 auto;padding:80px 40px 60px}
.modal-close{position:fixed;top:24px;right:32px;z-index:3001;background:var(--glass);border:1px solid var(--glass-border);color:var(--white);width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:22px;transition:all .3s}.modal-close:hover{background:var(--glass-hover)}
.modal-title{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,44px);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:40px;text-align:center}
.modal-grid{display:grid;gap:16px}
.modal-grid.mixed{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(300px,1fr))}
.modal-grid.all-portrait{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(220px,1fr))}
.modal-grid.all-landscape{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(400px,1fr))}
.modal-vid{border-radius:var(--r);overflow:hidden;background:var(--card)}
.modal-vid.landscape{aspect-ratio:16/9}
.modal-vid.portrait{aspect-ratio:9/16}
.modal-vid iframe{width:100%;height:100%;border:none}

/* CONTACT */
.contact{background:var(--black);text-align:center;padding:140px 60px}
.contact-text{font-family:var(--fd);font-size:clamp(26px,4.5vw,46px);font-weight:600;max-width:720px;margin:0 auto 44px;line-height:1.25}
.contact-text em{font-style:italic;color:var(--w90)}
.contact-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:16px 36px;background:var(--white);color:var(--black);border:none;border-radius:50px;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;font-family:var(--fd);cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;transition:all .3s}
.contact-btn:hover{transform:scale(1.04);box-shadow:0 0 36px rgba(242,242,240,.1)}

/* DCS FOOTER SECTION */
.dcs{background:var(--black);text-align:center;padding:80px 60px 40px}
.dcs-logo img{height:60px;margin-bottom:32px;opacity:.6}
.dcs-words{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:24px;font-size:clamp(24px,4vw,48px);letter-spacing:2px;text-transform:uppercase}
.dcs-words span:nth-child(1){font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-weight:300;color:var(--w30)}
.dcs-words span:nth-child(2){font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-weight:400;color:var(--w50)}
.dcs-words span:nth-child(3){font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-weight:600;color:var(--w70)}

.footer{border-top:1px solid var(--glass-border);padding:28px 60px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;background:var(--black)}
.footer-text{color:var(--w30);font-size:12px}
.ft-soc{display:flex;gap:16px}.ft-soc a{color:var(--w30);transition:color .3s;display:flex}.ft-soc a:hover{color:var(--white)}

.fi{opacity:0;transform:translateY(24px);transition:opacity .7s,transform .7s}.fi.v{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}
.fil{opacity:0;transform:translateX(-30px);transition:opacity .7s,transform .7s}.fil.v{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}
.fir{opacity:0;transform:translateX(30px);transition:opacity .7s,transform .7s}.fir.v{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0)}
.fis{opacity:0;transform:scale(.95);transition:opacity .6s,transform .6s}.fis.v{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}

.mob-ov{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:999;background:rgba(11,11,11,.97);backdrop-filter:blur(30px);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:28px;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .3s}
.mob-ov.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all}.mob-ov a{color:var(--white);text-decoration:none;font-size:26px;font-family:var(--fd);font-weight:600}.mob-x{position:absolute;top:24px;right:32px;background:none;border:none;color:var(--white);font-size:28px;cursor:pointer}

body.hc{--white:#fff;--w90:rgba(255,255,255,.95);--w70:rgba(255,255,255,.85);--w50:rgba(255,255,255,.75);--w30:rgba(255,255,255,.6);--w15:rgba(255,255,255,.3);--glass-border:rgba(255,255,255,.2)}
body.lt{font-size:18px}body.lt .hero-tag,body.lt .about-text p,body.lt .svc-card p,body.lt .tm-text{font-size:18px}
body.hl a{outline:2px solid var(--white);outline-offset:2px}
body.rm *,body.rm *::before,body.rm *::after{animation:none!important;transition-duration:.01ms!important}

@media(max-width:900px){
section{padding:80px 24px}.nav{padding:14px 20px}.nav-links,.nav-soc{display:none}.mob-btn{display:flex}
.about-g{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:36px}.about-img{max-height:400px;aspect-ratio:auto}
.svc-grid{flex-wrap:wrap}.svc-card{min-width:calc(50% - 7px)}
.footer{flex-direction:column;gap:14px;text-align:center;padding:20px}.contact{padding:80px 24px}
.pj-card{min-width:280px}.fav-item.landscape{width:280px}.fav-item.portrait{width:160px}
.a11y-p{width:100%;right:-100%}.modal-inner{padding:60px 16px}}
@media(max-width:600px){.hero-name{letter-spacing:0}.svc-card{min-width:100%}.pj-card{min-width:260px}}
[dir="rtl"] .about-g{direction:rtl}[dir="rtl"] .about-text{text-align:right}
[dir="rtl"] .a11y-p{right:auto;left:-360px;border-left:none;border-right:1px solid var(--glass-border)}[dir="rtl"] .a11y-p.open{left:0}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav class="nav" id="nb">
<a href="#" class="nav-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="SN"></a>
<ul class="nav-links">
<li><a href="#projects" data-en="Projects" data-he="פרויקטים">Projects</a></li>
<li><a href="#about" data-en="About" data-he="אודות">About</a></li>
<li><a href="#contact" data-en="Contact" data-he="צור קשר">Contact</a></li>
</ul>
<div class="nav-r">
<div class="nav-soc">
<a href="https://www.instagram.com/sharbel.najem" target="_blank" aria-label="Instagram"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="5"/><path d="M16 11.37A4 4 0 1112.63 8 4 4 0 0116 11.37z"/><line x1="17.5" y1="6.5" x2="17.51" y2="6.5"/></svg></a>
<a href="https://youtube.com/@sharbelnajem." target="_blank" aria-label="YouTube"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M22.54 6.42a2.78 2.78 0 00-1.94-2C18.88 4 12 4 12 4s-6.88 0-8.6.46a2.78 2.78 0 00-1.94 2A29 29 0 001 12a29 29 0 00.46 5.58 2.78 2.78 0 001.94 2C5.12 20 12 20 12 20s6.88 0 8.6-.46a2.78 2.78 0 001.94-2A29 29 0 0023 12a29 29 0 00-.46-5.58z"/><polygon points="9.75 15.02 15.5 12 9.75 8.98"/></svg></a>
<a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@sharbelnajem" target="_blank" aria-label="TikTok"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M19.59 6.69a4.83 4.83 0 01-3.77-4.25V2h-3.45v13.67a2.89 2.89 0 01-2.88 2.5 2.89 2.89 0 01-2.89-2.89 2.89 2.89 0 012.89-2.89c.28 0 .54.04.79.1V9.01a6.27 6.27 0 00-.79-.05 6.34 6.34 0 00-6.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 006.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 006.34-6.34V8.75a8.18 8.18 0 004.76 1.52V6.84a4.86 4.86 0 01-1-.15z"/></svg></a>
</div>

<h1 class="hero-name">Sharbel Najem</h1>
<p class="hero-tag" data-en="Professional filmmaker and content creator - delivering cinematic visuals that tell stories and drive real results for brands." data-he="צלם מקצועי ויוצר תוכן - מייצר ויזואלים קולנועיים שמספרים סיפור ומניעים תוצאות אמיתיות למותגים.">Professional filmmaker and content creator - delivering cinematic visuals that tell stories and drive real results for brands.</p>
</div>

<section class="about" id="about">
<div class="about-g">
<div class="about-img fil"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Sharbel Najem"></div>
<div class="about-text fir">
<span class="s-label" data-en="About" data-he="אודות">About</span>
<h2 class="s-title" data-en="Sharbel Najem" data-he="שרבל נג'ם">Sharbel Najem</h2>
<p data-en="A professional filmmaker and commercial content creator, focused on producing high-end video content across social media, lifestyle, tourism, and brand storytelling. With a proven track record in visually rich projects, each one built around a clear strategic objective." data-he="צלם מקצועי ויוצר תוכן שיווקי ומסחרי, מתמחה בהפקת וידאו ברמה גבוהה בתחומי הסושיאל, לייף סטייל, תיירות ותוכן מותגי. עם ניסיון מוכח בפרויקטים עשירים ויזואלית, כל אחד בנוי סביב מטרה אסטרטגית ברורה.">A professional filmmaker and commercial content creator, focused on producing high-end video content across social media, lifestyle, tourism, and brand storytelling. With a proven track record in visually rich projects, each one built around a clear strategic objective.</p>
<p data-en="Every project begins with a deep understanding of the brand - its identity, audience, and goals. From creative direction and scripting to the final edit, every detail is crafted to connect with the right audience and deliver measurable impact." data-he="כל פרויקט מתחיל מהבנה מעמיקה של המותג - הזהות שלו, קהל היעד והמטרות. מכיוון קריאייטיבי ותסריט ועד לעריכה הסופית, כל פרט מעוצב כדי לפגוע בקהל הנכון ולייצר אימפקט מדיד.">Every project begins with a deep understanding of the brand - its identity, audience, and goals. From creative direction and scripting to the final edit, every detail is crafted to connect with the right audience and deliver measurable impact.</p>
<div class="about-links">
<a href="mailto:sharbelnajem9@gmail.com" class="about-link"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>sharbelnajem9@gmail.com</a>
<a href="https://www.instagram.com/sharbel.najem" class="about-link" target="_blank"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="5"/><path d="M16 11.37A4 4 0 1112.63 8 4 4 0 0116 11.37z"/><line x1="17.5" y1="6.5" x2="17.51" y2="6.5"/></svg>Instagram</a>
<a href="https://youtube.com/@sharbelnajem." class="about-link" target="_blank"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22.54 6.42a2.78 2.78 0 00-1.94-2C18.88 4 12 4 12 4s-6.88 0-8.6.46a2.78 2.78 0 00-1.94 2A29 29 0 001 12a29 29 0 00.46 5.58 2.78 2.78 0 001.94 2C5.12 20 12 20 12 20s6.88 0 8.6-.46a2.78 2.78 0 001.94-2A29 29 0 0023 12a29 29 0 00-.46-5.58z"/><polygon points="9.75 15.02 15.5 12 9.75 8.98"/></svg>YouTube</a>
<a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@sharbelnajem" class="about-link" target="_blank"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M19.59 6.69a4.83 4.83 0 01-3.77-4.25V2h-3.45v13.67a2.89 2.89 0 01-2.88 2.5 2.89 2.89 0 01-2.89-2.89 2.89 2.89 0 012.89-2.89c.28 0 .54.04.79.1V9.01a6.27 6.27 0 00-.79-.05 6.34 6.34 0 00-6.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 006.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 006.34-6.34V8.75a8.18 8.18 0 004.76 1.52V6.84a4.86 4.86 0 01-1-.15z"/></svg>TikTok</a>
</div>

</section>

<section class="contact" id="contact">
<div class="fi">
<span class="s-label" data-en="Let's Talk" data-he="בואו נדבר">Let's Talk</span>
<h2 class="contact-text" data-en="Ready to bring your vision to life<em>?</em> Let's create content that makes an impact." data-he="מוכנים להפוך את החזון למציאות<em>?</em> בואו ניצור תוכן שעושה אימפקט.">Ready to bring your vision to life<em>?</em> Let's create content that makes an impact.</h2>
<a href="mailto:sharbelnajem9@gmail.com?subject=Lead from Portfolio" class="contact-btn">
<svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M4 4h16c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2v12c0 1.1-.9 2-2 2H4c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V6c0-1.1.9-2 2-2z"/><polyline points="22,6 12,13 2,6"/></svg>
<span data-en="Contact Me" data-he="צור קשר">Contact Me</span></a>
</div>
</section>

<section class="dcs">
<div class="dcs-logo"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="SN"></div>
<div class="dcs-words"><span>DREAM</span><span>CREATE</span><span>SHARE</span></div>
</section>
<footer class="footer">
<span class="footer-text">© 2026 Sharbel Najem. All rights reserved.</span>
<div class="ft-soc">
<a href="https://www.instagram.com/sharbel.najem" target="_blank"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="2" y="2" width="20" height="20" rx="5"/><path d="M16 11.37A4 4 0 1112.63 8 4 4 0 0116 11.37z"/><line x1="17.5" y1="6.5" x2="17.51" y2="6.5"/></svg></a>
<a href="https://youtube.com/@sharbelnajem." target="_blank"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M22.54 6.42a2.78 2.78 0 00-1.94-2C18.88 4 12 4 12 4s-6.88 0-8.6.46a2.78 2.78 0 00-1.94 2A29 29 0 001 12a29 29 0 00.46 5.58 2.78 2.78 0 001.94 2C5.12 20 12 20 12 20s6.88 0 8.6-.46a2.78 2.78 0 001.94-2A29 29 0 0023 12a29 29 0 00-.46-5.58z"/><polygon points="9.75 15.02 15.5 12 9.75 8.98"/></svg></a>
<a href="https://www.tiktok.com/@sharbelnajem" target="_blank"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M19.59 6.69a4.83 4.83 0 01-3.77-4.25V2h-3.45v13.67a2.89 2.89 0 01-2.88 2.5 2.89 2.89 0 01-2.89-2.89 2.89 2.89 0 012.89-2.89c.28 0 .54.04.79.1V9.01a6.27 6.27 0 00-.79-.05 6.34 6.34 0 00-6.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 006.34 6.34 6.34 6.34 0 006.34-6.34V8.75a8.18 8.18 0 004.76 1.52V6.84a4.86 4.86 0 01-1-.15z"/></svg></a>
</div>
</footer>

<!-- PROJECT MODAL -->
<div class="modal-ov" id="modal">
<button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModal()">×</button>
<div class="modal-inner" id="modalInner"></div>
</div>

<script>
const PJ = [{"name": "Hotels", "videos": [["mtc8M91PBHI", "short"], ["vL_uCo50aoI", "regular"], ["HpmxjaMdaFM", "regular"], ["ePshwYQIJJA", "regular"], ["WN5FhwN6gVU", "short"], ["4azt96uWZcM", "short"]]}, {"name": "Travel", "videos": [["otSm2afOdvE", "regular"], ["e6WifnHaPgQ", "regular"], ["MPQLD-Ucv8Q", "regular"], ["QiAQCXHSk54", "regular"], ["KAZTt4Ar8AU", "regular"], ["NnWmPEr5HNc", "regular"]]}, {"name": "Real Estate & Interior Design", "videos": [["0LWdH_13Nk4", "short"], ["wqBzz4bmc5U", "short"], ["7Fzj0sxoJeg", "short"], ["hVrYX7ACOnY", "short"], ["0CgusHan-Lg", "short"], ["F4Tlzd_Es5I", "short"], ["GQYE4mDhFxo", "short"]]}, {"name": "Tourism & Companies", "videos": [["87N7DjpVA0g", "regular"], ["mWY1fUCgA-w", "regular"], ["KEHy7vxuqhU", "regular"], ["P5c-ky1U4pQ", "short"], ["A0eVEzYTQAk", "short"]]}, {"name": "Podcast", "videos": [["iHCMzmN7Yiw", "short"], ["flh0fYWu0U0", "short"], ["RKcJQcWUdWw", "short"], ["lCa_yrZCbyQ", "short"]]}, {"name": "Technology", "videos": [["z9zX0DtTy-o", "regular"]]}, {"name": "Kristian Najem", "videos": []}, {"name": "Naadned", "videos": []}, {"name": "Blendar", "videos": []}];

let cL='en';
function tLang(){cL=cL==='en'?'he':'en';document.documentElement.dir=cL==='he'?'rtl':'ltr';document.documentElement.lang=cL;document.getElementById('langB').textContent=cL==='en'?'עב':'EN';document.querySelectorAll('[data-en]').forEach(el=>{const t=el.getAttribute('data-'+cL);if(t){if(t.includes('<em>')){el.innerHTML=t}else{el.textContent=t}}})}
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{document.getElementById('nb').classList.toggle('sc',window.scrollY>50)});
const obs=new IntersectionObserver(es=>{es.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting)e.target.classList.add('v')})},{threshold:.08,rootMargin:'0px 0px -30px 0px'});
document.querySelectorAll('.fi,.fil,.fir,.fis').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
function openA(){document.getElementById('aP').classList.add('open');document.getElementById('aOv').classList.add('open')}
function closeA(){document.getElementById('aP').classList.remove('open');document.getElementById('aOv').classList.remove('open')}
function tA(c,b){document.body.classList.toggle(c);b.classList.toggle('on')}
function scrollPj(d){const t=document.getElementById('pjTrack');const c=t.querySelector('.pj-card');const w=c.offsetWidth+20;const cs=getComputedStyle(t);const m=new DOMMatrix(cs.transform);let cur=m.m41;t.style.animation='none';t.style.transform='translateX('+(cur+(-d*w))+'px)';clearTimeout(window._pt);window._pt=setTimeout(()=>{t.style.animation='';t.style.transform=''},5000)}
function oMob(){document.getElementById('mOv').classList.add('open');document.body.style.overflow='hidden'}
function cMob(){document.getElementById('mOv').classList.remove('open');document.body.style.overflow=''}
document.querySelectorAll('a[href^="#"]').forEach(a=>{a.addEventListener('click',e=>{const t=document.querySelector(a.getAttribute('href'));if(t){e.preventDefault();t.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'start'})}})});

function openProject(i){
  const p=PJ[i];if(!p||!p.videos.length)return;
  const m=document.getElementById('modal');
  const inner=document.getElementById('modalInner');
  const allShort=p.videos.every(v=>v[1]==='short');
  const allReg=p.videos.every(v=>v[1]==='regular');
  const gridClass=allShort?'all-portrait':allReg?'all-landscape':'mixed';
  let h='<h2 class="modal-title">'+p.name+'</h2><div class="modal-grid '+gridClass+'">';
  p.videos.forEach(v=>{
    const orient=v[1]==='short'?'portrait':'landscape';
    h+='<div class="modal-vid '+orient+'"><iframe src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/'+v[0]+'?rel=0&modestbranding=1&showinfo=0" allow="accelerometer;autoplay;clipboard-write;encrypted-media;gyroscope;picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen></iframe></div>';
  });
  h+='</div>';
  inner.innerHTML=h;
  m.classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
}
function closeModal(){document.getElementById('modal').classList.remove('open');document.body.style.overflow='';document.getElementById('modalInner').innerHTML=''}
</script>
</body></html>
